PreToolUse.description: Doc file warning: warn about non-standard documentation files

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/git push/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Review changes before push...')}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

SessionStart.description: Load previous context and detect package manager
Auto-load TEAM-STATE.md for projects with PM-system (silent if absent)

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/gh pr create/.test(cmd)){const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';const m=out.match(/https:\/\/github.com\/[^/]+\/[^/]+\/pull\/\d+/);if(m){console.error('[Hook] PR created: '+m[0])}}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-move task files to completed-tasks/ when status: done. Disable via PM_NO_AUTO_HOUSEKEEPING=true. Silent on non-task files.
Show security checklist progress when editing .ts source files. Disable via AGENT_SECURITY_IMPL_FEEDBACK=off. Silent for non-source or no-active-task.

SubagentStart.description: Log subagent start for cost monitoring

SubagentStop.description: Log subagent stop for cost monitoring
Append per-agent token usage to ~/.claude/logs/agent-usage.jsonl. Disable with AGENT_USAGE_LOG=off.

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const wt=i.worktree_path||'';if(wt){const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');['.env','.env.local','.env.development','.env.test'].forEach(f=>{const s=p.resolve(process.cwd(),f);const d2=p.join(wt,f);if(fs.existsSync(s)&&!fs.existsSync(d2)){fs.copyFileSync(s,d2);console.error('[Hook] Copied '+f+' to worktree')}})}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

WorktreeCreate.description: Copy .env files to worktree on creation
